trivia: The stretched Dreamliner fixed everything: more seats, more range, better economics. It became the family's best seller and the default widebody of the 2020s.
From the ground a -9 and -8 are hard to split; on paper the -9 is six meters longer and flies noticeably farther.
funFacts: Flies some of the longest nonstop routes in the world.
